MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-12-2018 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANTS SHINTA HALIM, ERICK KURNIAWAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL DAVID MISRAHI'S DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS UNOPPOSED AND IS THEREFORE GRANTED. THE PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATES SERVICE ON ATTORNEY JONATHAN BORNSTEIN (WITHOUT SPECIFYING HIM AS MR. MISRAHI'S COUNSEL), AND THE DOCKET SHOWS MR. MISRAHI'S CROSS-COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON HIS BEHALF BY ATTORNEY JONATHAN BORNSTEIN. SANCTIONS IN THE REQUESTED AMOUNT OF $990.00 ARE AWARDED AGAINST BOTH ATTORNEY JONATHAN BORNSTEIN AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT MISRAHI, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MISRAHI IS ORDERED TO ATTEND DEPOSITION BY DEFENDANTS/CROSS-DEFENDANTS HALIM AND KURNIAWAN IN ACCORDANCE WITH THEIR RE-NOTICE OF DEPOSITION AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS DATED MAY 9, 2018, SAID DEPOSITION TO TAKE PLACE WITHIN THIRTY DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER OR AS THE PARTIES MAY OTHERWISE AGREE IN WRITING AT LEAST SEVEN DAYS BEFORE ANY SUCH MUTUALLY AGREED ALTERNATIVE DATE. IF THE DEPONENT FAILS TO APPEAR AS ORDERED HEREIN, OR AS OTHERWISE AGREED IN WRITING BETWEEN THE PARTIES, THEN THE COURT SHALL ENTERTAIN A FURTHER MOTION TO COMPEL AND REQUEST FOR FURTHER SANCTIONS. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HELBRAUN; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED, (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel David Misrahi'S Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrew S. Warner, Attorney at Law, appearing for defendants/cross-defendants, Telephone Number (650)-991-5126 Ext. 13:
No other appearance.

Ruling: The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SHINTA HALIM, ERICK KURNIAWAN'S Motion To Compel David Misrahi'S Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions is unopposed and is therefore GRANTED. The proof of service indicates service on attorney Jonathan Bornstein (without specifying him as Mr. Misrahi's counsel), and the docket shows Mr. Misrahi's cross-complaint was filed on his behalf by attorney Jonathan Bornstein. Sanctions in the requested amount of $990.00 are awarded against both attorney Jonathan Bornstein and cross-complainant Misrahi, jointly and severally. Cross-complainant Misrahi is ordered to attend deposition by defendants/cross-defendants Halim and Kurniawan in accordance with their Re-Notice of Deposition and Demand for Production of Documents dated May 9, 2018, said deposition to take place within thirty days from the date of this Order or as the parties may otherwise agree in writing at least seven days before any such mutually agreed alternative date. If the deponent fails to appear as ordered herein, or as otherwise agreed in writing between the parties, then the Court shall entertain a further motion to compel and request for further sanctions. Order is signed in open Court. Judge Pro Tem David Helbraun; Clerk: William Trupek; Not Reported, (302/JPT)
